programName: DWSD Neighborhood Lead Service Line Replacement Program
subsidyType: neighborhood-by-neighborhood utility-managed replacement tied to water main work and available funding
publicSideCovered: yes DWSD replaces the line from the water main when work reaches the block
privateSideCovered: yes DWSD says it replaces the lead service line with homeowner permission while crews are on the block
propertyRules: neighborhood timing depends on construction schedules funding and DWSD outreach before work begins
contractorRules: DWSD crews or contractors coordinate replacement and homeowner permission
